heading: Before You Begin
body:
To build an aggregation pipeline, choose a collection and click the
**Aggregations** tab. Atlas displays a blank
aggregation pipeline. The **Preview of Documents in the
Collection** section shows 10 documents randomly sampled from the chosen
collection.

> **Note:** 
>
> MongoDB Search Stages
>
> When you connect to a MongoDB deployment hosted on
> [Atlas](https://www.mongodb.com/cloud/atlas),
> Atlas-only stages [$search](atlas/reference/atlas-search/query-syntax)
> and [$searchMeta](atlas/reference/atlas-search/query-syntax)
> become available in the Aggregation Pipeline Builder. Use these stages
> to perform [full-text search](atlas/atlas-search/atlas-search-overview)
> on Atlas collections.
